holdings.infoBox: TOS is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 10.90%, Coherent at 9.65%, NVIDIA at 9.05%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 8.60%, and Dimensional International Small Cap Value ETF at 8.25%.

overview.description: The Twin Oak Strategic Solutions ETF (TOS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio of US equity securities of all market capitalizations. In addition, the fund may invest in affiliated ETFs and derivatives. TOS was launched on Jan 28, 2026 and is issued by Twin Oak.
